---
title: A Footprint-Aware, High-Resolution Approach for Carbon Flux Prediction Across Diverse Ecosystems
date: '2025-01-01'
author: [Jake Searcy, Anish Dulal, Scott Bridgham, Ashley Cordes, Lillian Aoki, Brendan Bohannan, Qing Zhu, Lucas CR Silva]
publication: arXiv preprint arXiv:2512.01917 (2025).
categories: [environment]
url_source: ''
url_preprint: 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.01917'
journ: arXiv preprint arXiv:2512.01917
issue: null
page: ''
year: 2025
image: ''
pub_number: 17
---
